# FORGE AGENTIC MARKETING — Social Content Pack
## Month 1 | 23 June – 18 July 2026
### Generated by SPARK | FORGE Social Media Machine

---

## PLATFORM STRATEGY

### Primary: Instagram + Facebook
### Secondary: LinkedIn + TikTok

**Why Instagram:**
FORGE's work is visual. A £74.99 website going live in 10 minutes is a before/after story. The agency behind-the-scenes content — agent pipelines, live deploys, real client sites — performs exceptionally well on Instagram with the tech-curious audience that influences tradespeople's decisions. Target: business owners aged 25–45 who consume content before they buy.

**Why Facebook:**
London tradespeople are on Facebook. Local trade groups, "recommend a plumber" posts, community boards — this is where FORGE's exact customer hangs out. Facebook also supports longer copy, which suits the education angle. Target: tradespeople aged 30–55 who need convincing that AI marketing is for them, not just tech companies.

**Why LinkedIn:**
Credibility channel. Case studies, stats, the origin story. Press, partnerships, and B2B amplification happen here. FORGE's story — building a £25k agency stack in 4 hours — is LinkedIn gold. Post frequency: 2x per week.

**Why TikTok:**
Viral potential for "AI builds a website in 60 seconds" style content. Short, punchy, visual. FORGE's deployment speed is a natural hook. One well-timed video here can drive hundreds of inbound enquiries. Post frequency: 2x per week to start.

**90-day outcome:**
- Facebook: 500+ page followers, 3–5 inbound enquiries per week from local trade groups
- Instagram: 300+ followers, consistent brand awareness with London business owners
- LinkedIn: 200+ company page followers, 1–2 partnership conversations opened
- TikTok: 1 viral video minimum if the deploy speed content hits

---

## CONTENT PILLARS

| Pillar | % | What it does |
|--------|---|---|
| 1. Proof & Results | 30% | Shows the work. Websites built. Before/afters. Speed. |
| 2. Education | 25% | Teaches tradespeople why they're losing money without a website |
| 3. Behind the Machine | 20% | Shows how FORGE works — the AI, the agents, the process |
| 4. Trust & Authority | 15% | Stats, case studies, credentials, origin story |
| 5. Direct Offer | 10% | Package pricing, limited spots, CTA posts |

**POST 2 | Tuesday 24 June | Facebook | Pillar 2 — Education | Text post**

**Topic:** The cost of having no website
**Hook:** `If a Londoner can't find you on Google, they called your competitor. Not exaggerating.`

**Full caption:**
```
If a Londoner can't find you on Google, they called your competitor. Not exaggerating.

Here's what having no website actually costs a London tradesperson:

→ The average job lost to a competitor with a site: £300–£800
→ How many people Google a tradesperson before calling: 7 in 10
→ How many of those call someone with no online presence: almost none

We're not talking about a £5,000 agency website. We're talking about a clean, fast, professional site that tells people who you are, what you do, and how to book you.

FORGE builds that for £74.99. Deployed in under 10 minutes.

Is your business on Google right now? Drop a comment — we'll check for you.

#LondonTrades #Plumber #Electrician #Builder #SmallBusiness #LondonBusiness
```

**POST 12 | Tuesday 8 July | LinkedIn | Pillar 2 — Education | Text**

**Topic:** The economics of a London tradesperson's online presence
**Hook:** `The maths of why a London tradesperson with no website is leaving £40,000/year on the table.`

**Full caption:**
```
The maths of why a London tradesperson with no website is leaving £40,000/year on the table.

Average job value for a London plumber: £350
Average number of people who Google before calling: 7 in 10
Average conversion rate of a good website vs no website: roughly 3:1

Now run the numbers.

If you get 20 enquiries a month through word of mouth, you're probably getting 8–10 more through Google if you have a site. Call it 8.

8 × £350 = £2,800/month
£2,800 × 12 = £33,600/year

Missed.

Not because the jobs don't exist. Because the people calling them couldn't find you.

A FORGE Package 1 website costs £74.99. The ROI question almost answers itself.

→ forgeisagentic.tech

#Tradesman #LondonBusiness #ROI #MarketingForTrades #SmallBusiness #BusinessGrowth
```

```
A Facebook page is not a website. Stop treating it like one.

Facebook can change its algorithm tomorrow. Your page reach drops overnight.
Facebook can suspend your page. No warning. No appeal.
Facebook doesn't show up the same way on Google searches.

A website is yours. No platform owns it. No algorithm controls it.

When someone Googles "plumber in Hackney" at 11pm — they find your website, or they find someone else's.

No Facebook page changes that.

→ Get a website that's actually yours: forgeisagentic.tech

#LondonPlumber #LondonElectrician #TradiesUK #WebsiteDesign #GoogleSearch #SmallBusiness
```

---

## QUICK-WIN ACTIONS — First 7 Days

1. **Upload brand assets to all 4 platforms** — use the Canva colour palette card and Facebook/Instagram cover from the brand kit. Consistency across all channels immediately signals professionalism.

2. **Pin Post 1 on every platform** — the origin story post. It's the strongest introduction to FORGE and should be the first thing anyone sees when they land on the page.

3. **Connect Instagram to Facebook Page** — allows cross-posting. Publish once, distribute twice. Saves time from day one.

4. **Follow 30 London trade accounts on Instagram** — plumbers, electricians, builders, roofers with small followings. They're the target customer. Some will follow back. All will see FORGE in their notifications.

5. **Set up Google Business Profile for FORGE** — yes, the agency needs one too. "Marketing agency in London" searches should return FORGE. Takes 10 minutes. Verification takes 5 days. Start today.

6. **Share the LinkedIn case study post (Post 3) personally** — Aaron shares it from his personal LinkedIn with a one-line note. Personal reach is always higher than company page reach in month 1.

7. **Reply to every comment within 1 hour for the first month** — the SPARK listener will handle client comments eventually. For FORGE's own channels, manual replies in month 1 build algorithm trust and show the brand is alive.

---

## REEL PRIORITY ORDER

For maximum reach, prioritise these reels in order:

1. **Post 4** — "How FORGE deploys a website in 10 minutes" (highest viral potential)
2. **Post 14** — "Watch FORGE build a website in real time" (proof + curiosity)
3. **Post 9** — "3 reasons you're losing jobs online" (education + relatable pain)
4. **Post 19** — "If you're a London tradesperson with no website" (direct offer, warm audience)
